original_query:
SELECT
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    hd_vehicle_count,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN inventory ON inventory.inv_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND inventory.inv_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    AND inventory.inv_warehouse_sk = web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk
JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN store ON store.s_state = warehouse.w_state
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand >= store_sales.ss_quantity
    AND item.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND item.i_manager_id IN (3, 15, 17, 26, 43, 44, 55, 70, 82, 95)
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('IN', 'LA', 'NE', 'NM', 'OH')
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY cnt;
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(store_sales web_sales) Rows(customer_demographics household_demographics #300) Leading(d1 item store_sales web_sales) */
SELECT
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    hd_vehicle_count,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN inventory ON inventory.inv_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND inventory.inv_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    AND inventory.inv_warehouse_sk = web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk
JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN store ON store.s_state = warehouse.w_state
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand >= store_sales.ss_quantity
    AND item.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND item.i_manager_id IN (3, 15, 17, 26, 43, 44, 55, 70, 82, 95)
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('IN', 'LA', 'NE', 'NM', 'OH')
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY cnt;

original_query:
WITH filtered_store_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk, SR_REFUNDED_CASH
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND sr_return_quantity > 0
      AND sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity BETWEEN 236 AND 295
      AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 28 AND 31
),
customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
           sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
           sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
           SUM(SR_REFUNDED_CASH) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM filtered_store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT ctr_store_sk,
           AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS avg_total
    FROM customer_total_return
    GROUP BY ctr_store_sk
),
filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_current_cdemo_sk
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_month = 5
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1956
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer_total_return ctr1
JOIN store_averages sa ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sa.ctr_store_sk
JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk AND store.s_state IN ('MI', 'NC', 'WI')
JOIN filtered_customers c ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_total
  AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('4 yr Degree', 'College')
  AND cd.cd_gender = 'M'
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_store_returns AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk, SR_REFUNDED_CASH
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND sr_return_quantity > 0
      AND sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity BETWEEN 236 AND 295
      AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 28 AND 31
),
customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
           sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
           sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
           SUM(SR_REFUNDED_CASH) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM filtered_store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk
),
store_averages AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT ctr_store_sk,
           AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS avg_total
    FROM customer_total_return
    GROUP BY ctr_store_sk
),
filtered_customers AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_current_cdemo_sk
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_month = 5
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1956
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer_total_return ctr1
JOIN store_averages sa ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sa.ctr_store_sk
JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk AND store.s_state IN ('MI', 'NC', 'WI')
JOIN filtered_customers c ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_total
  AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('4 yr Degree', 'College')
  AND cd.cd_gender = 'M'
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH d1_filtered AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY AS end_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1999
),
item_filtered AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports')
),
hd_filtered AS (
    SELECT hd_demo_sk
    FROM household_demographics
    WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20
    AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
),
ca_filtered AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR')
)
SELECT min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number)
FROM store_returns sr
INNER JOIN d1_filtered d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN store_sales ss ON sr.sr_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
                          AND sr.sr_ticket_number = ss.ss_ticket_number
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price >= 0.80 * ss.ss_list_price
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price <= 1.00 * ss.ss_list_price
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN ca_filtered ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN hd_filtered hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
                        AND sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
                       AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND d1.end_date;
rewritten_query:
/*+ NoNestLoop(sr ss) NoNestLoop(sr ws) Rows(sr ws #500) */
WITH d1_filtered AS NOT MATERIALIZED ( /* */
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY AS end_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1999
),
item_filtered AS NOT MATERIALIZED ( /* */
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports')
),
hd_filtered AS NOT MATERIALIZED ( /* */
    SELECT hd_demo_sk
    FROM household_demographics
    WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20
    AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
),
ca_filtered AS NOT MATERIALIZED ( /* */
    SELECT ca_address_sk
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR')
)
SELECT min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number)
FROM store_returns sr
INNER JOIN d1_filtered d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN store_sales ss ON sr.sr_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
                          AND sr.sr_ticket_number = ss.ss_ticket_number
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price >= 0.80 * ss.ss_list_price
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price <= 1.00 * ss.ss_list_price
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN ca_filtered ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN hd_filtered hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
                        AND sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
                       AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND d1.end_date;

original_query:
SELECT AVG(ss_quantity),
       AVG(ss_ext_sales_price),
       AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost),
       SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost)
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN customer_demographics ON cd_demo_sk = ss_cdemo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON ss_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
WHERE d_year = 2001
  AND ca_country = 'United States'
  AND (
      (cd_marital_status = 'U' AND cd_education_status = 'College' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00 AND hd_dep_count = 3)
      OR (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
      OR (cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd_education_status = 'College' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
  )
  AND (
      (ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)
      OR (ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)
      OR (ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'TX') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250)
  );
rewritten_query:
/*+ NoNestLoop(store_sales customer_demographics) Rows(store_sales customer_address #5000) */
SELECT AVG(ss_quantity),
       AVG(ss_ext_sales_price),
       AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost),
       SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost)
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN customer_demographics ON cd_demo_sk = ss_cdemo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON ss_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
WHERE d_year = 2001
  AND ca_country = 'United States'
  AND (
      (cd_marital_status = 'U' AND cd_education_status = 'College' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00 AND hd_dep_count = 3)
      OR (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
      OR (cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd_education_status = 'College' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
  )
  AND (
      (ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)
      OR (ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)
      OR (ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'TX') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250)
  );

original_query:
WITH filtered_ss AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_quantity, 
           ss.ss_ext_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
           ss.ss_cdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_hdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_addr_sk,
           ss.ss_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001
)
SELECT MIN(ss_quantity) AS min_ss_quantity,
       MIN(ss_ext_sales_price) AS min_ss_ext_sales_price,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost_dup
FROM (
    -- Scenario 1
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'U'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 3
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 2
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 3
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'S'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'TX')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250
) AS combined
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_ss AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_quantity, 
           ss.ss_ext_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
           ss.ss_cdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_hdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_addr_sk,
           ss.ss_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001
)
SELECT MIN(ss_quantity) AS min_ss_quantity,
       MIN(ss_ext_sales_price) AS min_ss_ext_sales_price,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost_dup
FROM (
    -- Scenario 1
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'U'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 3
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 2
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 3
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'S'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'TX')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250
) AS combined

original_query:
SELECT 
    i_item_id, 
    ca_country, 
    ca_state, 
    ca_county, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_quantity AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg1, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_list_price AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg2, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_coupon_amt AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg3, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_sales_price AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg4, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_net_profit AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg5, 
    AVG(CAST(c_birth_year AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg6 
FROM 
    catalog_sales, 
    customer_demographics, 
    customer, 
    customer_address, 
    date_dim, 
    item 
WHERE 
    cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk 
    AND cs_item_sk = i_item_sk 
    AND cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk 
    AND cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk 
    AND cd_gender = 'F' 
    AND cd_education_status = 'College' 
    AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk 
    AND d_year = 2001 
    AND c_birth_month = 5 
    AND ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR') 
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 84 AND 89 
    AND i_category = 'Jewelry' 
GROUP BY 
    ROLLUP (i_item_id, ca_country, ca_state, ca_county) 
ORDER BY 
    ca_country, 
    ca_state, 
    ca_county, 
    i_item_id 
LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(catalog_sales item) HashJoin(catalog_sales customer) HashJoin(catalog_sales customer_demographics) HashJoin(catalog_sales customer_address) */
SELECT 
    i_item_id, 
    ca_country, 
    ca_state, 
    ca_county, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_quantity AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg1, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_list_price AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg2, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_coupon_amt AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg3, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_sales_price AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg4, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_net_profit AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg5, 
    AVG(CAST(c_birth_year AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg6 
FROM 
    catalog_sales, 
    customer_demographics, 
    customer, 
    customer_address, 
    date_dim, 
    item 
WHERE 
    cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk 
    AND cs_item_sk = i_item_sk 
    AND cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk 
    AND cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk 
    AND cd_gender = 'F' 
    AND cd_education_status = 'College' 
    AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk 
    AND d_year = 2001 
    AND c_birth_month = 5 
    AND ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR') 
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 84 AND 89 
    AND i_category = 'Jewelry' 
GROUP BY 
    ROLLUP (i_item_id, ca_country, ca_state, ca_county) 
ORDER BY 
    ca_country, 
    ca_state, 
    ca_county, 
    i_item_id 
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select min(i_item_id),         min(ca_country),         min(ca_state),         min(ca_county),         min(cs_quantity),         min(cs_list_price),         min(cs_coupon_amt),         min(cs_sales_price),         min(cs_net_profit),         min(c_birth_year),         min(cd_dep_count)  from catalog_sales, customer_demographics, customer, customer_address, date_dim, item  where cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and        cs_item_sk = i_item_sk and        cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk and        cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk and        cd_gender = 'F' and        cd_education_status = 'College' and        c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk and        d_year = 2001 and        c_birth_month = 5 and        ca_state in ('MT', 'OH', 'OR')        and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 84 AND 89        AND i_category = 'Jewelry' ;

original_query: select  i_brand_id brand_id, i_brand brand, i_manufact_id, i_manufact,  	sum(ss_ext_sales_price) ext_price   from date_dim, store_sales, item,customer,customer_address,store   where  d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk     and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk     and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk     and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk     and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk     AND i_category  = 'Home'     and d_year=2002     and d_moy = 8     and substring(ca_zip,1,5) <> substring(s_zip,1,5)     and ca_state  = 'GA'     and c_birth_month = 4     and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100  group by i_brand       ,i_brand_id       ,i_manufact_id       ,i_manufact  order by ext_price desc          ,i_brand          ,i_brand_id          ,i_manufact_id          ,i_manufact limit 100 ;

/*+ NoNestLoop(item store_sales) NoNestLoop(customer store_sales) NoNestLoop(customer_address customer) Rows(store_sales date_dim #5000) */
select  i_brand_id brand_id, i_brand brand, i_manufact_id, i_manufact,  	sum(ss_ext_sales_price) ext_price   from date_dim, store_sales, item,customer,customer_address,store   where  d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk     and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk     and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk     and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk     and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk     AND i_category  = 'Home'     and d_year=2002     and d_moy = 8     and substring(ca_zip,1,5) <> substring(s_zip,1,5)     and ca_state  = 'GA'     and c_birth_month = 4     and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100  group by i_brand       ,i_brand_id       ,i_manufact_id       ,i_manufact  order by ext_price desc          ,i_brand          ,i_brand_id          ,i_manufact_id          ,i_manufact limit 100 ;

original_query:
SELECT MIN(i_brand_id), MIN(i_manufact_id), MIN(ss_ext_sales_price)
FROM date_dim
JOIN store_sales ON d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_year = 2002
  AND d_moy = 8
  AND i_category = 'Home'
  AND ca_state = 'GA'
  AND c_birth_month = 4
  AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
  AND LEFT(ca_zip, 5) <> LEFT(s_zip, 5);
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(customer store_sales) HashJoin(customer_address customer) HashJoin(item store_sales) */
SELECT MIN(i_brand_id), MIN(i_manufact_id), MIN(ss_ext_sales_price)
FROM date_dim
JOIN store_sales ON d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE d_year = 2002
  AND d_moy = 8
  AND i_category = 'Home'
  AND ca_state = 'GA'
  AND c_birth_month = 4
  AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
  AND LEFT(ca_zip, 5) <> LEFT(s_zip, 5);

original_query:
WITH frequent_ss_items AS (
    SELECT substring(i_item_desc,1,30) AS itemdesc, i_item_sk AS item_sk, d_date AS solddate
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 77 AND 96
      AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Jewelry', 'Sports')
    GROUP BY i_item_sk, d_date, substring(i_item_desc,1,30)
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 4
),
max_store_sales AS (
    SELECT MAX(csales) AS tpcds_cmax
    FROM (
        SELECT c_customer_sk, SUM(ss_quantity * ss_sales_price) AS csales
        FROM store_sales
        JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year = 2001
          AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
        GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    ) tmp1
),
best_ss_customer AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE c_birth_year BETWEEN 1977 AND 1983
      AND d_year = 2001
      AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING SUM(ss_quantity * ss_sales_price) > 0.95 * (SELECT tpcds_cmax FROM max_store_sales)
)
SELECT SUM(sales)
FROM (
    SELECT cs_quantity * cs_list_price AS sales
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN frequent_ss_items ON cs_item_sk = item_sk
    JOIN best_ss_customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND d_moy = 10
      AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_quantity * ws_list_price AS sales
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN frequent_ss_items ON ws_item_sk = item_sk
    JOIN best_ss_customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND d_moy = 10
      AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
) tmp2
LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
/*+ NoNestLoop(catalog_sales frequent_ss_items) NoNestLoop(web_sales frequent_ss_items) */
WITH frequent_ss_items AS ( 
    SELECT substring(i_item_desc,1,30) AS itemdesc, i_item_sk AS item_sk, d_date AS solddate
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 77 AND 96
      AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Jewelry', 'Sports')
    GROUP BY i_item_sk, d_date, substring(i_item_desc,1,30)
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 4
),
max_store_sales AS ( 
    SELECT MAX(csales) AS tpcds_cmax
    FROM (
        SELECT c_customer_sk, SUM(ss_quantity * ss_sales_price) AS csales
        FROM store_sales
        JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year = 2001
          AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
        GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    ) tmp1
),
best_ss_customer AS ( 
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE c_birth_year BETWEEN 1977 AND 1983
      AND d_year = 2001
      AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING SUM(ss_quantity * ss_sales_price) > 0.95 * (SELECT tpcds_cmax FROM max_store_sales)
)
SELECT SUM(sales)
FROM (
    SELECT cs_quantity * cs_list_price AS sales
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN frequent_ss_items ON cs_item_sk = item_sk
    JOIN best_ss_customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND d_moy = 10
      AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_quantity * ws_list_price AS sales
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN frequent_ss_items ON ws_item_sk = item_sk
    JOIN best_ss_customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND d_moy = 10
      AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
) tmp2
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH filtered_dates_1 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy = 8 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_dates_2 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy BETWEEN 8 AND 10 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_item_sk, ss_ticket_number, ss_store_sk, ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_item_sk, sr_ticket_number, sr_net_loss
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_catalog AS (
    SELECT cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk, cs_net_profit
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
)
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(fs.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(fr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(fc.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM filtered_sales fs
JOIN filtered_returns fr ON fs.ss_customer_sk = fr.sr_customer_sk
    AND fs.ss_item_sk = fr.sr_item_sk
    AND fs.ss_ticket_number = fr.sr_ticket_number
JOIN filtered_catalog fc ON fr.sr_customer_sk = fc.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND fr.sr_item_sk = fc.cs_item_sk
JOIN store s ON fs.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN item i ON fs.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(fs fr) HashJoin(fr fc) Rows(fs fr #10000) */
WITH filtered_dates_1 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy = 8 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_dates_2 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy BETWEEN 8 AND 10 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_sales AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_item_sk, ss_ticket_number, ss_store_sk, ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_returns AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_item_sk, sr_ticket_number, sr_net_loss
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_catalog AS NOT MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk, cs_net_profit
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
)
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(fs.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(fr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(fc.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM filtered_sales fs
JOIN filtered_returns fr ON fs.ss_customer_sk = fr.sr_customer_sk
    AND fs.ss_item_sk = fr.sr_item_sk
    AND fs.ss_ticket_number = fr.sr_ticket_number
JOIN filtered_catalog fc ON fr.sr_customer_sk = fc.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND fr.sr_item_sk = fc.cs_item_sk
JOIN store s ON fs.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN item i ON fs.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
SELECT
  MIN(i_item_id),
  MIN(i_item_desc),
  MIN(s_store_id),
  MIN(s_store_name),
  MIN(ss_net_profit),
  MIN(sr_net_loss),
  MIN(cs_net_profit),
  MIN(ss_item_sk),
  MIN(sr_ticket_number),
  MIN(cs_order_number)
FROM
  store_sales
  JOIN date_dim d1 ON d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk AND d1.d_moy = 6 AND d1.d_year = 2000
  JOIN store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
  JOIN item ON i_item_sk = ss_item_sk
  JOIN store_returns ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk 
                     AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk 
                     AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
  JOIN date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
                   AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8 
                   AND d2.d_year = 2000
  JOIN catalog_sales ON sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk 
                     AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk 
                   AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8 
                   AND d3.d_year = 2000;
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(store_returns store_sales) HashJoin(store_sales catalog_sales) Rows(store_returns date_dim #5000) */
SELECT
  MIN(i_item_id),
  MIN(i_item_desc),
  MIN(s_store_id),
  MIN(s_store_name),
  MIN(ss_net_profit),
  MIN(sr_net_loss),
  MIN(cs_net_profit),
  MIN(ss_item_sk),
  MIN(sr_ticket_number),
  MIN(cs_order_number)
FROM
  store_sales
  JOIN date_dim d1 ON d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk AND d1.d_moy = 6 AND d1.d_year = 2000
  JOIN store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
  JOIN item ON i_item_sk = ss_item_sk
  JOIN store_returns ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk 
                     AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk 
                     AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
  JOIN date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
                   AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8 
                   AND d2.d_year = 2000
  JOIN catalog_sales ON sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk 
                     AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk 
                   AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8 
                   AND d3.d_year = 2000;

original_query:
SELECT i_item_id,
       s_state,
       GROUPING(s_state) AS g_state,
       AVG(ss_quantity) AS agg1,
       AVG(ss_list_price) AS agg2,
       AVG(ss_coupon_amt) AS agg3,
       AVG(ss_sales_price) AS agg4
FROM store_sales
JOIN customer_demographics ON ss_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE cd_gender = 'M'
  AND cd_marital_status = 'S'
  AND cd_education_status = 'College'
  AND d_year = 2002
  AND s_state = 'IL'
  AND i_category = 'Jewelry'
GROUP BY ROLLUP (i_item_id, s_state)
ORDER BY i_item_id, s_state
LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(customer_demographics) Rows(store_sales date_dim #30000) Rows(store_sales date_dim store #600) Rows(store_sales date_dim store item #30) */
SELECT i_item_id,
       s_state,
       GROUPING(s_state) AS g_state,
       AVG(ss_quantity) AS agg1,
       AVG(ss_list_price) AS agg2,
       AVG(ss_coupon_amt) AS agg3,
       AVG(ss_sales_price) AS agg4
FROM store_sales
JOIN customer_demographics ON ss_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE cd_gender = 'M'
  AND cd_marital_status = 'S'
  AND cd_education_status = 'College'
  AND d_year = 2002
  AND s_state = 'IL'
  AND i_category = 'Jewelry'
GROUP BY ROLLUP (i_item_id, s_state)
ORDER BY i_item_id, s_state
LIMIT 100;
